notes: GP DocStudio 2.1 - Redaction is now fully solid (no see-through preview). Smart redaction groups duplicate PANs/Aadhaars with select-all, clear and undo, and a Show-on-page locator. PDF to Excel now converts bank statements correctly (running balance verified) and keeps every figure in its own cell for easy Text-to-Columns on mutual-fund / capital-gains statements.
